[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeGlyphRamp](../../TextmodeGlyphRamp.md) / constructor

# Constructor: constructor()

# Constructor

```ts
new TextmodeGlyphRamp(characters): TextmodeGlyphRamp;
```

Create a ramp from characters ordered from low values to high values.

At least two grapheme clusters are required.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `characters` | `string` | Character sequence ordered from low to high. |

## Returns

[`TextmodeGlyphRamp`](../../TextmodeGlyphRamp.md)

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="constructor" encoded-code="" />
